meta.title: Pilot Program - Baara
meta.description: Join the Baara pilot program and discover work-based recruitment.

hero.title: Recruit based on
hero.subtitle: Discover a new way to identify the best talents. Evaluate candidates on their achievements, not their degrees.

benefits.earlyAccess: Early access to the Baara platform before launch
benefits.profiles: Candidate profiles based on their concrete achievements
benefits.support: Dedicated support throughout the pilot program
benefits.pricing: Guaranteed preferential pricing at official launch

form.title: Request your access
form.subtitle: Limited spots - Join the pilot program
form.name: Your name

talents.title: Qualified talents
talents.description: Access to pre-validated candidate profiles with concrete proof of their skills.

matching.title: Precise matching
matching.description: Our algorithm identifies candidates whose work exactly matches your needs.

time.title: Time savings
time.description: Reduce your recruitment time by directly evaluating completed work.

risk.title: Zero risk
risk.description: Test the platform for free during the pilot program. No commitment.

step1.title: Program registration
step1.description: Fill out the form and our team will contact you within 24 hours.

step2.title: Personalized onboarding
step2.description: Let's define your needs together and configure your recruiter space.

step3.title: Platform access
step3.description: Explore candidate profiles and discover a new way to recruit.

step4.title: Feedback and improvement
step4.description: Your feedback helps us build the best recruitment tool.

pricing.title: Free during the pilot
pricing.description: Enjoy full access to the platform at no cost

cta.title: Ready to transform your recruitment?
cta.description: Join companies that have already chosen to recruit based on real work.
